allow: PowerShell(docker exec recruitsense_postgres psql -U postgres -d recruitsense -c "\\dt")
PowerShell(Set-Location "e:\\projects\\RecruitSense\\frontend" && Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal)

PowerShell(docker exec recruitsense_postgres bash -c "sed -i 's/host all all all scram-sha-256/host all all all trust/' /var/lib/postgresql/data/pg_hba.conf && psql -U postgres -c 'SELECT pg_reload_conf\(\);'")
PowerShell(docker exec recruitsense_postgres bash -c "psql -U postgres -c \\"SELECT client_addr, state FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE usename='postgres' LIMIT 5)
PowerShell(docker exec recruitsense_postgres psql -U postgres -c "SHOW hba_file; SHOW data_directory;")
PowerShell(docker exec recruitsense_postgres psql -U postgres -c "ALTER SYSTEM SET log_connections = on; ALTER SYSTEM SET log_line_prefix = '%t [%p] %u@%d from %h '; SELECT pg_reload_conf\(\);")
PowerShell(docker exec recruitsense_postgres psql -U postgres -c "ALTER SYSTEM SET log_connections = on;")
PowerShell(docker exec recruitsense_postgres psql -U postgres -c "SELECT pg_reload_conf\(\);")

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Set-Location "e:\\projects\\RecruitSense\\backend"; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'e:\\projects\\RecruitSense\\backend'; npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal; Write-Host "Backend starting...")
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'e:\\projects\\RecruitSense\\frontend'; npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal; Write-Host "Frontend starting...")
PowerShell(docker exec recruitsense_postgres psql -U postgres -d recruitsense -c "SELECT typname FROM pg_type WHERE typtype = 'e';")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('pdf-parse'\); console.log\('type:', typeof p\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(p\)\); console.log\('default:', typeof p.default\);")
Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\('pdf-parse'\); const p = new PDFParse\(\); console.log\('methods:', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const net = require\('net'\); const s = net.createConnection\(6379, '127.0.0.1'\); s.on\('connect', \(\) => { console.log\('Redis port OPEN'\); s.destroy\(\); }\); s.on\('error', \(e\) => console.log\('Redis port ERROR:', e.message\)\);")
